info.title: Paytrail Payment API
info.description: Paytrail Payment API provides endpoints for creating and managing payments, refunds, tokenization, and settlement reporting for Finnish e-commerce merchants.

parameters.name: checkout-nonce
parameters.description: Unique UUID identifier for the request

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount in minor units for filtering

get.summary: List grouped payment providers with localized data

post.summary: Redirect user to card addition form
Request card token after form submission
Request a payment report via callback
Request payment report for a specific settlement

unitPrice.description: Price per unit in minor units

vatId.description: VAT ID in international format (e.g. FI02454583)

amount.description: Amount to refund in minor units

HmacAuth.name: signature
HmacAuth.description: HMAC SHA256/SHA512 signature computed over checkout headers and request body
